concerns.detail: Retains gendered slur '学术妲己' (academic Daji) that attacks character via unsupported insinuation of using relationships for academic gain rather than criticizing concrete advising practices
Deletion removes substantive first-hand observation about advisor '耿' failing to reply to messages, attributed to a specific witness, appearing to suppress legitimate criticism rather than cleanup
concerns.excerpt: 我认识一个haoran的intern，他说耿有时候回消息就是bu hui

concerns.detail: Deleted text contains lab-specific descriptor 'haoran的intern' that identifies a student by their advisor and role, detailed enough to potentially de-anonymize the individual
